revision.comment: add {{[[Template:CatAutoTOC|CatAutoTOC]]}}, which will generate a table of contents (TOC) if the category has enough pages to need one
1 revision imported
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (5 members)
Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
revision.text:
{{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}}
<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:13th-century Buddhism|People]] [[Category:13th-century people by religion|Buddhists]] [[Category:Buddhists by century]] }}</noinclude>
[[Category:Categories with 5 members]]
[[en:Category:13th-century Buddhists]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=13th-century_Buddhists here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
